narrative: I am currently monitoring a medium-severity Neo4j authentication failure ({neo4j_code: Neo.ClientError.Security.Unauthorized}) that disrupts my Mem0 knowledge graph operations. My agents 'desktop', 'devops', 'financial_analyst', 'pim', and 'reasoning_methods' lack versioned prompts, creating potential inconsistency risks in their specialized workflows. Though system health remains "healthy" with 19 operational agents and 1573s uptime, these discrepancies in memory integrity and agent guidance require immediate attention.
